meta.title: PDF Evaluation Test Set
meta.note: Questions 21-25 are unanswerable from the PDFs above; correct response is a refusal or 'not found' statement.

questions.question: What were Johnson & Johnson's Innovative Medicine segment sales in fiscal year 2024?
What was Johnson & Johnson's adjusted diluted net earnings per share in 2024?
For how many consecutive years had Johnson & Johnson increased its dividend as of 2024?

questions.question: What was Johnson & Johnson's approximate free cash flow in 2024?
What MedTech product did Johnson & Johnson receive FDA clearance for partial-knee and robot-assisted spine surgery in 2024?
What planned acquisition did Johnson & Johnson announce in 2024 that is referenced in the annual report?
What was Johnson & Johnson's full-year adjusted net earnings in 2024?
What are JPMorgan Chase's two primary branded services mentioned in the annual report, and which customer segments do they each serve?
questions.ground_truth: J.P. Morgan (institutional and corporate clients globally) and Chase (consumers and small businesses, predominantly in the U.S.)

questions.question: How many major products did Johnson & Johnson launch in its MedTech segment in 2024, and name at least two specific platforms mentioned?
questions.ground_truth: 15 major products launched in MedTech in 2024. Platforms include VARIPULSE (pulsed field ablation) and VELYS (robot-assisted spine and partial-knee surgery).

questions.question: What was the exact salary of JPMorgan Chase's CEO Jamie Dimon in 2024?
